title: Monday.com working on Teams Interface
excerpt: Is it possible to work and see the information as if you were on the monday.com website with the Microsoft Teams app Interface using the monday.com addon?

posts.author: Ggarcia (Gloria García)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to work and see the information as if you were on the monday.com website with the Microsoft Teams app Interface using the monday.com addon?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gloria!

I just replied to your other post, but yes it certainly is possible! The app allows you to connect monday.com boards to selected Microsoft teams channels and view them as tabs. The board/tab will offer the same features and functionalities as if you were accessing the board from the website. There’s even a monday.com bot to review notifications from specific boards and create action items.

More information via the support article → Microsoft Teams App

Reach out if you have any further questions
